title: 9 Herbal Tinctures For White Tongue
description: Zingiber officinale tinctures contains compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. These properties help to combat the fungal infections that often cause white tongue, a condition characterized by a thick, white coating on the tongue. When taken internally, Zingiber officinale tinctures can help to reduce inflammation and kill off the fungal overgrowth, promoting a healthy balance of bacteria in the mouth. To use ...
